package.name: suspect_matcher
package.description: Suspect appearance-matching node for RDK X5. Compares two person-crop images (e.g. a reference "suspect" photo vs. a candidate frame cropped by an upstream YOLO-World detector) by querying the hobot_llamacpp VLM node for structured visible attributes (clothing color/type, hairstyle) on each image, then comparing those attributes to produce a yes/no match. This is surface-feature triage only, NOT face recognition or confirmed identity.
